perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with pigtails wearing a gray oversized T-shirt stands in a stadium, smiling and waving a pink heart-shaped object. (2) The scene shifts to a concert stage where four women in coordinated maroon and black outfits perform a synchronized dance routine with high-energy arm movements. (3) The performers move across the stage under intense green laser beams that sweep through the air as graphics flash on a large background LED screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic dance music starts with a driving beat and prominent synthesizer chords; loud crowd cheering and screaming are audible in the background. (2) Female vocals enter, singing in English with a powerful and rhythmic tone; the crowd's ambient noise remains high. (3) The music continues at a fast tempo with heavy percussion as the singers' voices rise in volume, accompanied by rhythmic chanting from the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '當你看到現場Jump!' (When you see the scene, Jump!) appears in white, conveying an excited and encouraging tone. (2) Functional Text: 'BORN PINK WORLD TOUR' and 'BLACKPINK' are visible on the stage's LED screens, identifying the performance. (3) Functional Text: '뛰어' (Jump) in Korean flashes on the background screen, matching the rhythmic climax of the song.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Fan reaction intro -> Live concert performance highlight

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female fan in the foreground of the first scene, 4 female performers on stage, and a large crowd of mixed gender in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman in a casual gray oversized shirt and black boots; four performers in matching maroon and black stage costumes with high boots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large stadium seating area packed with fans followed by a professional concert stage equipped with LED screens and sophisticated lighting rigs.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Stage lighting with green lasers and bright spotlights.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to share the high-energy fan experience of attending a BLACKPINK concert. It bridges the personal excitement of a fan (the 'Hook') with the professional performance of the group (the 'Highlight'), using the 'Jump' motif to invite the audience into the live atmosphere.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Pink heart-shaped lightstick, K-pop concert chanting.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The contrast between the stationary fan in the crowd and the dynamic stage action highlights the immersive nature of modern K-pop concert culture.
